overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in wizard robes ascending a grand spiral staircase inside a historic stone castle. The character climbs past heraldic shields and Gothic windows before reaching a landing with NPCs and exiting through a stone archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower spiral staircase with heraldic decorations

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up the stone spiral staircase, passing heraldic shields mounted on the left wall

entered.detail: grand stone spiral staircase with ornate railing curving upward
blue and gold heraldic shield mounted on the stone wall
red and gold heraldic shield above the blue shield
green and gold vertical banner hanging from the upper wall

segments.scene_description: The character begins ascending a narrow, enclosed spiral staircase within a stone castle. Heraldic shields and banners decorate the left wall while the stone staircase curves upward in a tight spiral. The lighting is warm and artificial, with no windows visible yet.

scene_state.functional_zone: illuminated spiral staircase with Gothic windows

events.description: natural daylight becomes visible through tall Gothic windows on the right wall

agents.ego_description: continuing to climb the staircase alongside tall arched windows that let in bright morning light

entered.detail: tall arched Gothic window with diamond-patterned glass letting in natural light
large dark wooden door at the top of the staircase landing

segments.scene_description: As the character ascends higher, the enclosed stone walls give way to tall Gothic windows on the right, flooding the staircase with natural light. The wooden door at the top landing becomes visible ahead, and the heraldic decorations disappear from view behind.

events.description: NPC students in blue robes appear descending the stairs toward the character
character passes through the stone archway into a brighter corridor

agents.ego_description: reaching the top landing, passing descending students, and exiting through the stone archway into the corridor beyond

notable_agents.action: student in blue wizard robes descending the staircase

entered.detail: ornate stone archway marking the exit from the staircase to the corridor
bright opening leading to the next area of the castle

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the top landing where NPC students in blue robes are descending the stairs. After passing them, the character moves through a stone archway, transitioning from the spiral staircase into a brighter corridor, leaving the grand staircase structure behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent from a dim, enclosed spiral staircase into a bright, open castle corridor. It begins within a narrow stone tower, curving upward past heraldic shields and banners under warm, artificial light. As the character climbs higher, the enclosed walls give way to tall Gothic windows that flood the space with natural light, shifting the atmosphere as the decorations fade from view. The scene then opens onto a top landing where the camera passes students in blue robes before moving through a stone archway. Finally, the movement transitions fully out of the spiral structure and into a luminous corridor.
